name: End to End Amazon Shopping Flow

steps.name: User navigate to chrome browser
I navigate to Home page of the Amazon web application
Go to the Hello,Sign in option
Click on the Sign in link
User move to the Login page

elements.name: User adds multiple products to cart

steps.name: User enters the valid phone number "9876543210" into the fieldbox
click on the Continue button
Enter the valid password "Test@123" into password field

result.error_message:
java.lang.AssertionError: Login is failed because user is not registered
	at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111)
	at stepDefinitions.loginStepDefinition.enter_password(loginStepDefinition.java:84)
	at ✽.Enter the valid password "Test@123" into password field(file:///C:/Users/mayan/eclipse-workspace/AutomationAmazonWeb/src/test/java/features/AmazonPurchase.feature:17)

steps.name: Click on the Sign In button
user should get successfully logged in
User clicks in the search field box
User enters the product name "Thermometer"
Clicks on the search icon button
All "Thermometer" results should be shown on the page
The user selects a "Thermometer" product
The user navigates to the product details page
User clicks on the Add to cart button
User clicks on the No Thanks button
Product should add into the cart
User clicks on the Go to Cart button
The user verifies product "Thermometer" is present in cart
The user verifies cart is not empty
User clicks on Proceed to Buy button
User should navigate to the checkout page
User selects delivery address
User should be redirected to payment page
User selects the payment method
